IfMatch 
HttpRequestHeaders.IfModifiedSince 
IfModifiedSince 
HttpRequestHeaders.IfNoneMatch 
IfNoneMatch 
HttpRequestHeaders.IfRange 
IfRange 
HttpRequestHeaders.IfUnmodifiedSince 
IfUnmodifiedSince 
HttpRequestHeaders.KeepAlive 
KeepAlive 
HttpRequestHeaders.LastModified 
LastModified 
HttpRequestHeaders.MaxForwards 
MaxForwards 
HttpRequestHeaders.Origin 
Origin 
HttpRequestHeaders.Pragma 
Pragma 
HttpRequestHeaders.Prefer 
Prefer 
HttpRequestHeaders.ProxyAuthorization 
ProxyAuthorization 
HttpRequestHeaders.Range 
Range 
HttpRequestHeaders.Referer 
Referer 
HttpRequestHeaders.TE 
TE 
HttpRequestHeaders.Trailer 
Trailer 
HttpRequestHeaders.TransferEncoding 
TransferEncoding 
HttpRequestHeaders.Translate 
Translate 
HttpRequestHeaders.Upgrade 
Upgrade 
HttpRequestHeaders.UserAgent 
UserAgent 
HttpRequestHeaders.Via 
Via 
HttpRequestHeaders.Warning 
Warning 
HttpRequestHeaders.XHTTPMethodOverride 
XHTTPMethodOverride

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Accept](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Accept)

HttpRequestHeaders.Accept 
Accept 
 Content-Types that are acceptable for the response

### [HttpRequestHeaders.AcceptCharset](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#AcceptCharset)

HttpRequestHeaders.AcceptCharset 
AcceptCharset 
 Character sets that are acceptable

### [HttpRequestHeaders.AcceptDatetime](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#AcceptDatetime)

HttpRequestHeaders.AcceptDatetime 
AcceptDatetime 
 Acceptable version in time

### [HttpRequestHeaders.AcceptEncoding](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#AcceptEncoding)

HttpRequestHeaders.AcceptEncoding 
AcceptEncoding 
 List of acceptable encodings. See HTTP compression.

### [HttpRequestHeaders.AcceptLanguage](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#AcceptLanguage)

HttpRequestHeaders.AcceptLanguage 
AcceptLanguage 
 List of acceptable human languages for response

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Allow](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Allow)

HttpRequestHeaders.Allow 
Allow 
 The Allow header, which specifies the set of HTTP methods supported.

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Authorization](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Authorization)

HttpRequestHeaders.Authorization 
Authorization 
 Authentication credentials for HTTP authentication

### [HttpRequestHeaders.BasicAuth](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#BasicAuth)

HttpRequestHeaders.BasicAuth 
BasicAuth 
 Authentication header using Basic Auth encoding

### [HttpRequestHeaders.CacheControl](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#CacheControl)

HttpRequestHeaders.CacheControl 
CacheControl 
 Used to specify directives that MUST be obeyed by all caching mechanisms along the request/response chain

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Connection](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Connection)

HttpRequestHeaders.Connection 
Connection 
 What type of connection the user-agent would prefer

### [HttpRequestHeaders.ContentDisposition](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#ContentDisposition)

HttpRequestHeaders.ContentDisposition 
ContentDisposition 
 Describes the placement of the content. Valid dispositions are: inline, attachment, form-data

### [HttpRequestHeaders.ContentEncoding](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#ContentEncoding)

HttpRequestHeaders.ContentEncoding 
ContentEncoding 
 The type of encoding used on the data

### [HttpRequestHeaders.ContentLanguage](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#ContentLanguage)

HttpRequestHeaders.ContentLanguage 
ContentLanguage 
 The language the content is in

### [HttpRequestHeaders.ContentLocation](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#ContentLocation)

HttpRequestHeaders.ContentLocation 
ContentLocation 
 An alternate location for the returned data

### [HttpRequestHeaders.ContentMD5](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#ContentMD5)

HttpRequestHeaders.ContentMD5 
ContentMD5 
 A Base64-encoded binary MD5 sum of the content of the request body

### [HttpRequestHeaders.ContentRange](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#ContentRange)

HttpRequestHeaders.ContentRange 
ContentRange 
 Where in a full body message this partial message belongs

### [HttpRequestHeaders.ContentType](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#ContentType)

HttpRequestHeaders.ContentType 
ContentType 
 The MIME type of the body of the request (used with POST and PUT requests)

### [HttpRequestHeaders.ContentTypeWithEncoding](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#ContentTypeWithEncoding)

HttpRequestHeaders.ContentTypeWithEncoding 
ContentTypeWithEncoding 
 The MIME type of the body of the request (used with POST and PUT requests) with an explicit encoding

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Date](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Date)

HttpRequestHeaders.Date 
Date 
 The date and time that the message was sent

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Expect](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Expect)

HttpRequestHeaders.Expect 
Expect 
 Indicates that particular server behaviors are required by the client

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Expires](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Expires)

HttpRequestHeaders.Expires 
Expires 
 Gives the date/time after which the response is considered stale

### [HttpRequestHeaders.From](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#From)

HttpRequestHeaders.From 
From 
 The email address of the user making the request

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Host](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Host)

HttpRequestHeaders.Host 
Host 
 The domain name of the server (for virtual hosting), and the TCP port number on which the server is listening.
 The port number may be omitted if the port is the standard port for the service requested.

### [HttpRequestHeaders.IfMatch](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#IfMatch)

HttpRequestHeaders.IfMatch 
IfMatch 
 Only perform the action if the client supplied entity matches the same entity on the server.
 This is mainly for methods like PUT to only update a resource if it has not been modified since the user last updated it. If-Match: "737060cd8c284d8af7ad3082f209582d" Permanent

### [HttpRequestHeaders.IfModifiedSince](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#IfModifiedSince)

HttpRequestHeaders.IfModifiedSince 
IfModifiedSince 
 Allows a 304 Not Modified to be returned if content is unchanged

### [HttpRequestHeaders.IfNoneMatch](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#IfNoneMatch)

HttpRequestHeaders.IfNoneMatch 
IfNoneMatch 
 Allows a 304 Not Modified to be returned if content is unchanged

### [HttpRequestHeaders.IfRange](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#IfRange)

HttpRequestHeaders.IfRange 
IfRange 
 If the entity is unchanged, send me the part(s) that I am missing; otherwise, send me the entire new entity

### [HttpRequestHeaders.IfUnmodifiedSince](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#IfUnmodifiedSince)

HttpRequestHeaders.IfUnmodifiedSince 
IfUnmodifiedSince 
 Only send the response if the entity has not been modified since a specific time

### [HttpRequestHeaders.KeepAlive](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#KeepAlive)

HttpRequestHeaders.KeepAlive 
KeepAlive 
 Specifies a parameter used into order to maintain a persistent connection

### [HttpRequestHeaders.LastModified](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#LastModified)

HttpRequestHeaders.LastModified 
LastModified 
 Specifies the date and time at which the accompanying body data was last modified

### [HttpRequestHeaders.MaxForwards](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#MaxForwards)

HttpRequestHeaders.MaxForwards 
MaxForwards 
 Limit the number of times the message can be forwarded through proxies or gateways

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Origin](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Origin)

HttpRequestHeaders.Origin 
Origin 
 Initiates a request for cross-origin resource sharing (asks server for an 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' response header)

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Pragma](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Pragma)

HttpRequestHeaders.Pragma 
Pragma 
 Implementation-specific headers that may have various effects anywhere along the request-response chain.

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Prefer](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Prefer)

HttpRequestHeaders.Prefer 
Prefer 
 Optional instructions to the server to control request processing. See RFC https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7240 for more details

### [HttpRequestHeaders.ProxyAuthorization](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#ProxyAuthorization)

HttpRequestHeaders.ProxyAuthorization 
ProxyAuthorization 
 Authorization credentials for connecting to a proxy.

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Range](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Range)

HttpRequestHeaders.Range 
Range 
 Request only part of an entity. Bytes are numbered from 0

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Referer](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Referer)

HttpRequestHeaders.Referer 
Referer 
 This is the address of the previous web page from which a link to the currently requested page was followed. (The word "referrer" is misspelled in the RFC as well as in most implementations.)

### [HttpRequestHeaders.TE](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#TE)

HttpRequestHeaders.TE 
TE 
 The transfer encodings the user agent is willing to accept: the same values as for the response header
 Transfer-Encoding can be used, plus the "trailers" value (related to the "chunked" transfer method) to
 notify the server it expects to receive additional headers (the trailers) after the last, zero-sized, chunk.

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Trailer](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Trailer)

HttpRequestHeaders.Trailer 
Trailer 
 The Trailer general field value indicates that the given set of header fields is present in the trailer of a message encoded with chunked transfer-coding

### [HttpRequestHeaders.TransferEncoding](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#TransferEncoding)

HttpRequestHeaders.TransferEncoding 
TransferEncoding 
 The TransferEncoding header indicates the form of encoding used to safely transfer the entity to the user.  The valid directives are one of: chunked, compress, deflate, gzip, or identity.

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Translate](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Translate)

HttpRequestHeaders.Translate 
Translate 
 Microsoft extension to the HTTP specification used in conjunction with WebDAV functionality.

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Upgrade](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Upgrade)

HttpRequestHeaders.Upgrade 
Upgrade 
 Specifies additional communications protocols that the client supports.

### [HttpRequestHeaders.UserAgent](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#UserAgent)

HttpRequestHeaders.UserAgent 
UserAgent 
 The user agent string of the user agent

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Via](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Via)

HttpRequestHeaders.Via 
Via 
 Informs the server of proxies through which the request was sent

### [HttpRequestHeaders.Warning](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#Warning)

HttpRequestHeaders.Warning 
Warning 
 A general warning about possible problems with the entity body

### [HttpRequestHeaders.XHTTPMethodOverride](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httprequestheaders.html#XHTTPMethodOverride)

HttpRequestHeaders.XHTTPMethodOverride 
XHTTPMethodOverride 
 Override HTTP method.

### [HttpResponseHeaders](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html)

HttpResponseHeaders 
 Headers that can be received in an HTTP response 
HttpResponseHeaders.AccessControlAllowOrigin 
AccessControlAllowOrigin 
HttpResponseHeaders.AcceptRanges 
AcceptRanges 
HttpResponseHeaders.Age 
Age 
HttpResponseHeaders.Allow 
Allow 
HttpResponseHeaders.CacheControl 
CacheControl 
HttpResponseHeaders.Connection 
Connection 
HttpResponseHeaders.ContentEncoding 
ContentEncoding 
HttpResponseHeaders.ContentLanguage 
ContentLanguage 
HttpResponseHeaders.ContentLength 
ContentLength 
HttpResponseHeaders.ContentLocation 
ContentLocation 
HttpResponseHeaders.ContentMD5 
ContentMD5 
HttpResponseHeaders.ContentDisposition 
ContentDisposition 
HttpResponseHeaders.ContentRange 
ContentRange 
HttpResponseHeaders.ContentType 
ContentType 
HttpResponseHeaders.Date 
Date 
HttpResponseHeaders.ETag 
ETag 
HttpResponseHeaders.Expires 
Expires 
HttpResponseHeaders.LastModified 
LastModified 
HttpResponseHeaders.Link 
Link 
HttpResponseHeaders.Location 
Location 
HttpResponseHeaders.P3P 
P3P 
HttpResponseHeaders.Pragma 
Pragma 
HttpResponseHeaders.ProxyAuthenticate 
ProxyAuthenticate 
HttpResponseHeaders.Refresh 
Refresh 
HttpResponseHeaders.RetryAfter 
RetryAfter 
HttpResponseHeaders.Server 
Server 
HttpResponseHeaders.SetCookie 
SetCookie 
HttpResponseHeaders.Status 
Status 
HttpResponseHeaders.StrictTransportSecurity 
StrictTransportSecurity 
HttpResponseHeaders.Trailer 
Trailer 
HttpResponseHeaders.TransferEncoding 
TransferEncoding 
HttpResponseHeaders.Vary 
Vary 
HttpResponseHeaders.Via 
Via 
HttpResponseHeaders.Warning 
Warning 
HttpResponseHeaders.WWWAuthenticate 
WWWAuthenticate

### [HttpResponseHeaders.AccessControlAllowOrigin](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#AccessControlAllowOrigin)

HttpResponseHeaders.AccessControlAllowOrigin 
AccessControlAllowOrigin 
 Specifying which web sites can participate in cross-origin resource sharing

### [HttpResponseHeaders.AcceptRanges](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#AcceptRanges)

HttpResponseHeaders.AcceptRanges 
AcceptRanges 
 What partial content range types this server supports

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Age](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Age)

HttpResponseHeaders.Age 
Age 
 The age the object has been in a proxy cache in seconds

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Allow](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Allow)

HttpResponseHeaders.Allow 
Allow 
 Valid actions for a specified resource. To be used for a 405 Method not allowed

### [HttpResponseHeaders.CacheControl](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#CacheControl)

HttpResponseHeaders.CacheControl 
CacheControl 
 Tells all caching mechanisms from server to client whether they may cache this object. It is measured in seconds

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Connection](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Connection)

HttpResponseHeaders.Connection 
Connection 
 Options that are desired for the connection

### [HttpResponseHeaders.ContentEncoding](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#ContentEncoding)

HttpResponseHeaders.ContentEncoding 
ContentEncoding 
 The type of encoding used on the data. See HTTP compression.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.ContentLanguage](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#ContentLanguage)

HttpResponseHeaders.ContentLanguage 
ContentLanguage 
 The language the content is in

### [HttpResponseHeaders.ContentLength](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#ContentLength)

HttpResponseHeaders.ContentLength 
ContentLength 
 The length of the response body in octets (8-bit bytes)

### [HttpResponseHeaders.ContentLocation](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#ContentLocation)

HttpResponseHeaders.ContentLocation 
ContentLocation 
 An alternate location for the returned data

### [HttpResponseHeaders.ContentMD5](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#ContentMD5)

HttpResponseHeaders.ContentMD5 
ContentMD5 
 A Base64-encoded binary MD5 sum of the content of the response

### [HttpResponseHeaders.ContentDisposition](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#ContentDisposition)

HttpResponseHeaders.ContentDisposition 
ContentDisposition 
 An opportunity to raise a "File Download" dialogue box for a known MIME type with binary format or suggest a filename for dynamic content. Quotes are necessary with special characters.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.ContentRange](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#ContentRange)

HttpResponseHeaders.ContentRange 
ContentRange 
 Where in a full body message this partial message belongs

### [HttpResponseHeaders.ContentType](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#ContentType)

HttpResponseHeaders.ContentType 
ContentType 
 The MIME type of this content

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Date](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Date)

HttpResponseHeaders.Date 
Date 
 The date and time that the message was sent (in "HTTP-date" format as defined by RFC 2616)

### [HttpResponseHeaders.ETag](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#ETag)

HttpResponseHeaders.ETag 
ETag 
 An identifier for a specific version of a resource, often a message digest

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Expires](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Expires)

HttpResponseHeaders.Expires 
Expires 
 Gives the date/time after which the response is considered stale

### [HttpResponseHeaders.LastModified](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#LastModified)

HttpResponseHeaders.LastModified 
LastModified 
 The last modified date for the requested object

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Link](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Link)

HttpResponseHeaders.Link 
Link 
 Used to express a typed relationship with another resource, where the relation type is defined by RFC 5988

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Location](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Location)

HttpResponseHeaders.Location 
Location 
 Used in redirection, or when a new resource has been created.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.P3P](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#P3P)

HttpResponseHeaders.P3P 
P3P 
 This header is supposed to set P3P policy

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Pragma](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Pragma)

HttpResponseHeaders.Pragma 
Pragma 
 Implementation-specific headers that may have various effects anywhere along the request-response chain.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.ProxyAuthenticate](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#ProxyAuthenticate)

HttpResponseHeaders.ProxyAuthenticate 
ProxyAuthenticate 
 Request authentication to access the proxy.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Refresh](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Refresh)

HttpResponseHeaders.Refresh 
Refresh 
 Used in redirection, or when a new resource has been created. This refresh redirects after 5 seconds.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.RetryAfter](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#RetryAfter)

HttpResponseHeaders.RetryAfter 
RetryAfter 
 If an entity is temporarily unavailable, this instructs the client to try again later. Value could be a specified period of time (in seconds) or a HTTP-date.[28]

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Server](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Server)

HttpResponseHeaders.Server 
Server 
 A name for the server

### [HttpResponseHeaders.SetCookie](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#SetCookie)

HttpResponseHeaders.SetCookie 
SetCookie 
 An HTTP cookie

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Status](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Status)

HttpResponseHeaders.Status 
Status 
 The HTTP status of the response

### [HttpResponseHeaders.StrictTransportSecurity](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#StrictTransportSecurity)

HttpResponseHeaders.StrictTransportSecurity 
StrictTransportSecurity 
 A HSTS Policy informing the HTTP client how long to cache the HTTPS only policy and whether this applies to subdomains.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Trailer](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Trailer)

HttpResponseHeaders.Trailer 
Trailer 
 The Trailer general field value indicates that the given set of header fields is present in the trailer of a message encoded with chunked transfer-coding.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.TransferEncoding](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#TransferEncoding)

HttpResponseHeaders.TransferEncoding 
TransferEncoding 
 The form of encoding used to safely transfer the entity to the user. Currently defined methods are: chunked, compress, deflate, gzip, identity.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Vary](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Vary)

HttpResponseHeaders.Vary 
Vary 
 Tells downstream proxies how to match future request headers to decide whether the cached response can be used rather than requesting a fresh one from the origin server.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Via](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Via)

HttpResponseHeaders.Via 
Via 
 Informs the client of proxies through which the response was sent.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.Warning](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#Warning)

HttpResponseHeaders.Warning 
Warning 
 A general warning about possible problems with the entity body.

### [HttpResponseHeaders.WWWAuthenticate](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpresponseheaders.html#WWWAuthenticate)

HttpResponseHeaders.WWWAuthenticate 
WWWAuthenticate 
 Indicates the authentication scheme that should be used to access the requested entity.

### [HttpStatusCodes](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html)

HttpStatusCodes 
 Status codes that can be received in an HTTP response 
HttpStatusCodes.Continue 
Continue 
HttpStatusCodes.SwitchingProtocols 
SwitchingProtocols 
HttpStatusCodes.Processing 
Processing 
HttpStatusCodes.EarlyHints 
EarlyHints 
HttpStatusCodes.OK 
OK 
HttpStatusCodes.Created 
Created 
HttpStatusCodes.Accepted 
Accepted 
HttpStatusCodes.NonAuthoritativeInformation 
NonAuthoritativeInformation 
HttpStatusCodes.NoContent 
NoContent 
HttpStatusCodes.ResetContent 
ResetContent 
HttpStatusCodes.PartialContent 
PartialContent 
HttpStatusCodes.MultiStatus 
MultiStatus 
HttpStatusCodes.AlreadyReported 
AlreadyReported 
HttpStatusCodes.IMUsed 
IMUsed 
HttpStatusCodes.MultipleChoices 
MultipleChoices 
HttpStatusCodes.MovedPermanently 
MovedPermanently 
HttpStatusCodes.Found 
Found 
HttpStatusCodes.SeeOther 
SeeOther 
HttpStatusCodes.NotModified 
NotModified 
HttpStatusCodes.UseProxy 
UseProxy 
HttpStatusCodes.SwitchProxy 
SwitchProxy 
HttpStatusCodes.TemporaryRedirect 
TemporaryRedirect 
HttpStatusCodes.PermanentRedirect 
PermanentRedirect 
HttpStatusCodes.BadRequest 
BadRequest 
HttpStatusCodes.Unauthorized 
Unauthorized 
HttpStatusCodes.PaymentRequired 
PaymentRequired 
HttpStatusCodes.Forbidden 
Forbidden 
HttpStatusCodes.NotFound 
NotFound 
HttpStatusCodes.MethodNotAllowed 
MethodNotAllowed 
HttpStatusCodes.NotAcceptable 
NotAcceptable 
HttpStatusCodes.ProxyAuthenticationRequired 
ProxyAuthenticationRequired 
HttpStatusCodes.RequestTimeout 
RequestTimeout 
HttpStatusCodes.Conflict 
Conflict 
HttpStatusCodes.Gone 
Gone 
HttpStatusCodes.LengthRequired 
LengthRequired 
HttpStatusCodes.PreconditionFailed 
PreconditionFailed 
HttpStatusCodes.PayloadTooLarge 
PayloadTooLarge 
HttpStatusCodes.URITooLong 
URITooLong 
HttpStatusCodes.UnsupportedMediaType 
UnsupportedMediaType 
HttpStatusCodes.RangeNotSatisfiable 
RangeNotSatisfiable 
HttpStatusCodes.ExpectationFailed 
ExpectationFailed 
HttpStatusCodes.MisdirectedRequest 
MisdirectedRequest 
HttpStatusCodes.UnprocessableEntity 
UnprocessableEntity 
HttpStatusCodes.Locked 
Locked 
HttpStatusCodes.FailedDependency 
FailedDependency 
HttpStatusCodes.UpgradeRequired 
UpgradeRequired 
HttpStatusCodes.PreconditionRequired 
PreconditionRequired 
HttpStatusCodes.TooManyRequests 
TooManyRequests 
HttpStatusCodes.RequestHeaderFieldsTooLarge 
RequestHeaderFieldsTooLarge 
HttpStatusCodes.UnavailableForLegalReasons 
UnavailableForLegalReasons 
HttpStatusCodes.InternalServerError 
InternalServerError 
HttpStatusCodes.NotImplemented 
NotImplemented 
HttpStatusCodes.BadGateway 
BadGateway 
HttpStatusCodes.ServiceUnavailable 
ServiceUnavailable 
HttpStatusCodes.GatewayTimeout 
GatewayTimeout 
HttpStatusCodes.HTTPVersionNotSupported 
HTTPVersionNotSupported 
HttpStatusCodes.VariantAlsoNegotiates 
VariantAlsoNegotiates 
HttpStatusCodes.InsufficientStorage 
InsufficientStorage 
HttpStatusCodes.LoopDetected 
LoopDetected 
HttpStatusCodes.NotExtended 
NotExtended 
HttpStatusCodes.NetworkAuthenticationRequired 
NetworkAuthenticationRequired

### [HttpStatusCodes.Continue](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#Continue)

HttpStatusCodes.Continue 
Continue 
 The server has received the request headers and the client should proceed to send the request body.

### [HttpStatusCodes.SwitchingProtocols](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#SwitchingProtocols)

HttpStatusCodes.SwitchingProtocols 
SwitchingProtocols 
 The requester has asked the server to switch protocols and the server has agreed to do so.

### [HttpStatusCodes.Processing](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#Processing)

HttpStatusCodes.Processing 
Processing 
 This code indicates that the server has received and is processing the request, but no response is available yet.

### [HttpStatusCodes.EarlyHints](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#EarlyHints)

HttpStatusCodes.EarlyHints 
EarlyHints 
 Used to return some response headers before final HTTP message.

### [HttpStatusCodes.OK](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#OK)

HttpStatusCodes.OK 
OK 
 Standard response for successful HTTP requests.

### [HttpStatusCodes.Created](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#Created)

HttpStatusCodes.Created 
Created 
 The request has been fulfilled, resulting in the creation of a new resource.

### [HttpStatusCodes.Accepted](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#Accepted)

HttpStatusCodes.Accepted 
Accepted 
 The request has been accepted for processing, but the processing has not been completed.

### [HttpStatusCodes.NonAuthoritativeInformation](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#NonAuthoritativeInformation)

HttpStatusCodes.NonAuthoritativeInformation 
NonAuthoritativeInformation 
 The server is a transforming proxy (e.g. a Web accelerator) that received a 200 OK from its origin, but is returning a modified version of the origin's response.

### [HttpStatusCodes.NoContent](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#NoContent)

HttpStatusCodes.NoContent 
NoContent 
 The server successfully processed the request and is not returning any content.

### [HttpStatusCodes.ResetContent](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#ResetContent)

HttpStatusCodes.ResetContent 
ResetContent 
 The server successfully processed the request, but is not returning any content.

### [HttpStatusCodes.PartialContent](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#PartialContent)

HttpStatusCodes.PartialContent 
PartialContent 
 The server is delivering only part of the resource (byte serving) due to a range header sent by the client.

### [HttpStatusCodes.MultiStatus](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#MultiStatus)

HttpStatusCodes.MultiStatus 
MultiStatus 
 The message body that follows is by default an XML message and can contain a number of separate response codes, depending on how many sub-requests were made.

### [HttpStatusCodes.AlreadyReported](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#AlreadyReported)

HttpStatusCodes.AlreadyReported 
AlreadyReported 
 The members of a DAV binding have already been enumerated in a preceding part of the (multistatus) response, and are not being included again.

### [HttpStatusCodes.IMUsed](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#IMUsed)

HttpStatusCodes.IMUsed 
IMUsed 
 The server has fulfilled a request for the resource, and the response is a representation of the result of one or more instance-manipulations applied to the current instance.

### [HttpStatusCodes.MultipleChoices](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#MultipleChoices)

HttpStatusCodes.MultipleChoices 
MultipleChoices 
 Indicates multiple options for the resource from which the client may choose (via agent-driven content negotiation).

### [HttpStatusCodes.MovedPermanently](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#MovedPermanently)

HttpStatusCodes.MovedPermanently 
MovedPermanently 
 This and all future requests should be directed to the given URI.

### [HttpStatusCodes.Found](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#Found)

HttpStatusCodes.Found 
Found 
 Tells the client to look at (browse to) another url. 302 has been superseded by 303 and 307.

### [HttpStatusCodes.SeeOther](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#SeeOther)

HttpStatusCodes.SeeOther 
SeeOther 
 The response to the request can be found under another URI using the GET method.

### [HttpStatusCodes.NotModified](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#NotModified)

HttpStatusCodes.NotModified 
NotModified 
 Indicates that the resource has not been modified since the version specified by the request headers If-Modified-Since or If-None-Match.

### [HttpStatusCodes.UseProxy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#UseProxy)

HttpStatusCodes.UseProxy 
UseProxy 
 The requested resource is available only through a proxy, the address for which is provided in the response.

### [HttpStatusCodes.SwitchProxy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#SwitchProxy)

HttpStatusCodes.SwitchProxy 
SwitchProxy 
 No longer used. Originally meant "Subsequent requests should use the specified proxy."

### [HttpStatusCodes.TemporaryRedirect](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#TemporaryRedirect)

HttpStatusCodes.TemporaryRedirect 
TemporaryRedirect 
 In this case, the request should be repeated with another URI; however, future requests should still use the original URI.

### [HttpStatusCodes.PermanentRedirect](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#PermanentRedirect)

HttpStatusCodes.PermanentRedirect 
PermanentRedirect 
 The request and all future requests should be repeated using another URI.

### [HttpStatusCodes.BadRequest](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#BadRequest)

HttpStatusCodes.BadRequest 
BadRequest 
 The server cannot or will not process the request due to an apparent client error.

### [HttpStatusCodes.Unauthorized](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#Unauthorized)

HttpStatusCodes.Unauthorized 
Unauthorized 
 Similar to 403 Forbidden, but specifically for use when authentication is required and has failed or has not yet been provided.

### [HttpStatusCodes.PaymentRequired](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#PaymentRequired)

HttpStatusCodes.PaymentRequired 
PaymentRequired 
 Reserved for future use.

### [HttpStatusCodes.Forbidden](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#Forbidden)

HttpStatusCodes.Forbidden 
Forbidden 
 The request was valid, but the server is refusing action. The user might not have the necessary permissions for a resource, or may need an account of some sort.

### [HttpStatusCodes.NotFound](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#NotFound)

HttpStatusCodes.NotFound 
NotFound 
 The requested resource could not be found but may be available in the future. Subsequent requests by the client are permissible.

### [HttpStatusCodes.MethodNotAllowed](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#MethodNotAllowed)

HttpStatusCodes.MethodNotAllowed 
MethodNotAllowed 
 A request method is not supported for the requested resource.

### [HttpStatusCodes.NotAcceptable](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#NotAcceptable)

HttpStatusCodes.NotAcceptable 
NotAcceptable 
 The requested resource is capable of generating only content not acceptable according to the Accept headers sent in the request.

### [HttpStatusCodes.ProxyAuthenticationRequired](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#ProxyAuthenticationRequired)

HttpStatusCodes.ProxyAuthenticationRequired 
ProxyAuthenticationRequired 
 The client must first authenticate itself with the proxy.

### [HttpStatusCodes.RequestTimeout](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#RequestTimeout)

HttpStatusCodes.RequestTimeout 
RequestTimeout 
 The server timed out waiting for the request.

### [HttpStatusCodes.Conflict](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#Conflict)

HttpStatusCodes.Conflict 
Conflict 
 Indicates that the request could not be processed because of conflict in the request, such as an edit conflict between multiple simultaneous updates.

### [HttpStatusCodes.Gone](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#Gone)

HttpStatusCodes.Gone 
Gone 
 Indicates that the resource requested is no longer available and will not be available again.

### [HttpStatusCodes.LengthRequired](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#LengthRequired)

HttpStatusCodes.LengthRequired 
LengthRequired 
 The request did not specify the length of its content, which is required by the requested resource.

### [HttpStatusCodes.PreconditionFailed](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#PreconditionFailed)

HttpStatusCodes.PreconditionFailed 
PreconditionFailed 
 The server does not meet one of the preconditions that the requester put on the request.

### [HttpStatusCodes.PayloadTooLarge](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#PayloadTooLarge)

HttpStatusCodes.PayloadTooLarge 
PayloadTooLarge 
 The request is larger than the server is willing or able to process.

### [HttpStatusCodes.URITooLong](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#URITooLong)

HttpStatusCodes.URITooLong 
URITooLong 
 The URI provided was too long for the server to process.

### [HttpStatusCodes.UnsupportedMediaType](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#UnsupportedMediaType)

HttpStatusCodes.UnsupportedMediaType 
UnsupportedMediaType 
 The request entity has a media type which the server or resource does not support.

### [HttpStatusCodes.RangeNotSatisfiable](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#RangeNotSatisfiable)

HttpStatusCodes.RangeNotSatisfiable 
RangeNotSatisfiable 
 The client has asked for a portion of the file (byte serving), but the server cannot supply that portion.

### [HttpStatusCodes.ExpectationFailed](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#ExpectationFailed)

HttpStatusCodes.ExpectationFailed 
ExpectationFailed 
 The server cannot meet the requirements of the Expect request-header field.

### [HttpStatusCodes.MisdirectedRequest](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#MisdirectedRequest)

HttpStatusCodes.MisdirectedRequest 
MisdirectedRequest 
 The request was directed at a server that is not able to produce a response.

### [HttpStatusCodes.UnprocessableEntity](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#UnprocessableEntity)

HttpStatusCodes.UnprocessableEntity 
UnprocessableEntity 
 The request was well-formed but was unable to be followed due to semantic errors.

### [HttpStatusCodes.Locked](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#Locked)

HttpStatusCodes.Locked 
Locked 
 The resource that is being accessed is locked.

### [HttpStatusCodes.FailedDependency](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#FailedDependency)

HttpStatusCodes.FailedDependency 
FailedDependency 
 The request failed because it depended on another request and that request failed (e.g., a PROPPATCH).

### [HttpStatusCodes.UpgradeRequired](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#UpgradeRequired)

HttpStatusCodes.UpgradeRequired 
UpgradeRequired 
 The client should switch to a different protocol such as TLS/1.0, given in the Upgrade header field.

### [HttpStatusCodes.PreconditionRequired](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#PreconditionRequired)

HttpStatusCodes.PreconditionRequired 
PreconditionRequired 
 The origin server requires the request to be conditional.

### [HttpStatusCodes.TooManyRequests](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#TooManyRequests)

HttpStatusCodes.TooManyRequests 
TooManyRequests 
 The user has sent too many requests in a given amount of time.

### [HttpStatusCodes.RequestHeaderFieldsTooLarge](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#RequestHeaderFieldsTooLarge)

HttpStatusCodes.RequestHeaderFieldsTooLarge 
RequestHeaderFieldsTooLarge 
 The server is unwilling to process the request because either an individual header field, or all the header fields collectively, are too large.

### [HttpStatusCodes.UnavailableForLegalReasons](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#UnavailableForLegalReasons)

HttpStatusCodes.UnavailableForLegalReasons 
UnavailableForLegalReasons 
 A server operator has received a legal demand to deny access to a resource or to a set of resources that includes the requested resource.

### [HttpStatusCodes.InternalServerError](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#InternalServerError)

HttpStatusCodes.InternalServerError 
InternalServerError 
 A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable.

### [HttpStatusCodes.NotImplemented](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#NotImplemented)

HttpStatusCodes.NotImplemented 
NotImplemented 
 The server either does not recognize the request method, or it lacks the ability to fulfil the request.

### [HttpStatusCodes.BadGateway](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#BadGateway)

HttpStatusCodes.BadGateway 
BadGateway 
 The server was acting as a gateway or proxy and received an invalid response from the upstream server.

### [HttpStatusCodes.ServiceUnavailable](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#ServiceUnavailable)

HttpStatusCodes.ServiceUnavailable 
ServiceUnavailable 
 The server is currently unavailable (because it is overloaded or down for maintenance).

### [HttpStatusCodes.GatewayTimeout](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#GatewayTimeout)

HttpStatusCodes.GatewayTimeout 
GatewayTimeout 
 The server was acting as a gateway or proxy and did not receive a timely response from the upstream server.

### [HttpStatusCodes.HTTPVersionNotSupported](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#HTTPVersionNotSupported)

HttpStatusCodes.HTTPVersionNotSupported 
HTTPVersionNotSupported 
 The server does not support the HTTP protocol version used in the request.

### [HttpStatusCodes.VariantAlsoNegotiates](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#VariantAlsoNegotiates)

HttpStatusCodes.VariantAlsoNegotiates 
VariantAlsoNegotiates 
 Transparent content negotiation for the request results in a circular reference.

### [HttpStatusCodes.InsufficientStorage](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#InsufficientStorage)

HttpStatusCodes.InsufficientStorage 
InsufficientStorage 
 The server is unable to store the representation needed to complete the request.

### [HttpStatusCodes.LoopDetected](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#LoopDetected)

HttpStatusCodes.LoopDetected 
LoopDetected 
 The server detected an infinite loop while processing the request.

### [HttpStatusCodes.NotExtended](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#NotExtended)

HttpStatusCodes.NotExtended 
NotExtended 
 Further extensions to the request are required for the server to fulfil it.

### [HttpStatusCodes.NetworkAuthenticationRequired](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-httpstatuscodes.html#NetworkAuthenticationRequired)

HttpStatusCodes.NetworkAuthenticationRequired 
NetworkAuthenticationRequired 
 The client needs to authenticate to gain network access.

### [Http](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-http.html)

Http 
 Utilities for working with network via HTTP. Includes methods for downloading
 resources with specified headers, query parameters and HTTP body 
Http.AppendQueryToUrl 
AppendQueryToUrl 
Http.AsyncRequest 
AsyncRequest 
Http.AsyncRequestStream 
AsyncRequestStream 
Http.AsyncRequestString 
AsyncRequestString 
Http.ParseLinkHeader 
ParseLinkHeader 
Http.Request 
Request 
Http.RequestStream 
RequestStream 
Http.RequestString 
RequestString

### [Http.AppendQueryToUrl](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-http.html#AppendQueryToUrl)

Http.AppendQueryToUrl 
AppendQueryToUrl 
 Appends the query parameters to the url, taking care of proper escaping

### [Http.AsyncRequest](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-http.html#AsyncRequest)

Http.AsyncRequest 
AsyncRequest 
 Download an HTTP web resource from the specified URL asynchronously
 (allows specifying query string parameters and HTTP headers including
 headers that have to be handled specially - such as Accept, Content-Type & Referer)
 The body for POST request can be specified either as text or as a list of parameters
 that will be encoded, and the method will automatically be set if not specified

### [Http.AsyncRequestStream](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-http.html#AsyncRequestStream)

Http.AsyncRequestStream 
AsyncRequestStream 
 Download an HTTP web resource from the specified URL asynchronously
 (allows specifying query string parameters and HTTP headers including
 headers that have to be handled specially - such as Accept, Content-Type & Referer)
 The body for POST request can be specified either as text or as a list of parameters
 that will be encoded, and the method will automatically be set if not specified

### [Http.AsyncRequestString](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-http.html#AsyncRequestString)

Http.AsyncRequestString 
AsyncRequestString 
 Download an HTTP web resource from the specified URL asynchronously
 (allows specifying query string parameters and HTTP headers including
 headers that have to be handled specially - such as Accept, Content-Type & Referer)
 The body for POST request can be specified either as text or as a list of parameters
 that will be encoded, and the method will automatically be set if not specified

### [Http.ParseLinkHeader](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-http.html#ParseLinkHeader)

Http.ParseLinkHeader 
ParseLinkHeader 
<pre> Parses an RFC 5988 Link header value (e.g. from a GitHub or other paginated API response)
 and returns a map from relation type to URL.

 For example, given the header value:
   <https://api.github.com/repos/.../releases?page=2>; rel="next", <...>; rel="last"
 this returns: Map [ "next", "https://..."; "last", "https://..." ]</pre>

### [Http.Request](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-http.html#Request)

Http.Request 
Request 
 Download an HTTP web resource from the specified URL synchronously
 (allows specifying query string parameters and HTTP headers including
 headers that have to be handled specially - such as Accept, Content-Type & Referer)
 The body for POST request can be specified either as text or as a list of parameters
 that will be encoded, and the method will automatically be set if not specified

### [Http.RequestStream](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-http.html#RequestStream)

Http.RequestStream 
RequestStream 
 Download an HTTP web resource from the specified URL synchronously
 (allows specifying query string parameters and HTTP headers including
 headers that have to be handled specially - such as Accept, Content-Type & Referer)
 The body for POST request can be specified either as text or as a list of parameters
 that will be encoded, and the method will automatically be set if not specified

### [Http.RequestString](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-http.html#RequestString)

Http.RequestString 
RequestString 
 Download an HTTP web resource from the specified URL synchronously
 (allows specifying query string parameters and HTTP headers including
 headers that have to be handled specially - such as Accept, Content-Type & Referer)
 The body for POST request can be specified either as text or as a list of parameters
 that will be encoded, and the method will automatically be set if not specified

### [CsvFile](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html)

CsvFile 

 Represents a CSV file. The lines are read on demand from <code>reader</code>.
 Columns are delimited by one of the chars passed by <code>separators</code> (defaults to just <code>,</code>), and
 to escape the separator chars, the <code>quote</code> character will be used (defaults to <code>"</code>).
 If <code>hasHeaders</code> is true (the default), the first line read by <code>reader</code> will not be considered part of data.
 If <code>ignoreErrors</code> is true (the default is false), rows with a different number of columns from the header row
 (or the first row if headers are not present) will be ignored.
 The first <code>skipRows</code> lines will be skipped.
  
CsvFile.``.ctor`` 
``.ctor`` 
CsvFile.GetColumnIndex 
GetColumnIndex 
CsvFile.TryGetColumnIndex 
TryGetColumnIndex 
CsvFile.Append 
Append 
CsvFile.Cache

### [CsvFile.GetColumnIndex](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#GetColumnIndex)

CsvFile.GetColumnIndex 
GetColumnIndex 
 Returns the index of the column with the given name

### [CsvFile.TryGetColumnIndex](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#TryGetColumnIndex)

CsvFile.TryGetColumnIndex 
TryGetColumnIndex 
 Returns the index of the column with the given name, or returns None if no column is found

### [CsvFile.Append](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#Append)

CsvFile.Append 
Append 
 Returns a csv with the same rows as the original plus the provided rows appended

### [CsvFile.Cache](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#Cache)

CsvFile.Cache 
Cache 
 Returns a new csv with the same rows as the original but which guarantees
 that each row will be only be read and parsed from the input at most once.

### [CsvFile.Filter](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#Filter)

CsvFile.Filter 
Filter 
 Returns a new csv containing only the rows for which the given predicate returns "true".

### [CsvFile.Map](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#Map)

CsvFile.Map 
Map 
 Returns a new csv where every row has been transformed by the provided mapping function.

### [CsvFile.Save](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#Save)

CsvFile.Save 
Save 
 Saves CSV to the specified file

### [CsvFile.Save](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#Save)

CsvFile.Save 
Save 
 Saves CSV to the specified stream

### [CsvFile.Save](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#Save)

CsvFile.Save 
Save 
 Saves CSV to the specified writer

### [CsvFile.SaveToString](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#SaveToString)

CsvFile.SaveToString 
SaveToString 
 Saves CSV to a string

### [CsvFile.Skip](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#Skip)

CsvFile.Skip 
Skip 
 Returns a csv that skips N rows and then yields the remaining rows.

### [CsvFile.SkipWhile](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#SkipWhile)

CsvFile.SkipWhile 
SkipWhile 
 Returns a csv that, when iterated, skips rows while the given predicate returns
 <c>true</c>, and then yields the remaining rows.

### [CsvFile.Take](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#Take)

CsvFile.Take 
Take 
 Returns a new csv with only the first N rows of the underlying csv.

### [CsvFile.TakeWhile](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#TakeWhile)

CsvFile.TakeWhile 
TakeWhile 
 Returns a csv that, when iterated, yields rows while the given predicate
 returns <c>true</c>, and then returns no further rows.

### [CsvFile.Truncate](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#Truncate)

CsvFile.Truncate 
Truncate 
 Returns a csv that when enumerated returns at most N rows.

### [CsvFile.Quote](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-csvfile.html#Quote)

Quote 
 The quotation mark use for surrounding values containing separator chars

 The number of columns

### [StringExtensions](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-stringextensions.html)

StringExtensions 
 Extension methods with conversions from strings to other types 
StringExtensions.AsBoolean 
AsBoolean 
StringExtensions.AsDateTime 
AsDateTime 
StringExtensions.AsDateTimeOffset 
AsDateTimeOffset 
StringExtensions.AsDecimal 
AsDecimal 
StringExtensions.AsFloat 
AsFloat 
StringExtensions.AsGuid 
AsGuid 
StringExtensions.AsInteger 
AsInteger 
StringExtensions.AsInteger64 
AsInteger64 
StringExtensions.AsTimeSpan 
AsTimeSpan

### [StringExtensions.AsBoolean](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-stringextensions.html#AsBoolean)

StringExtensions.AsBoolean 
AsBoolean 
Converts the string to a boolean. Fails if the value is not a valid boolean.

### [StringExtensions.AsDateTime](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-stringextensions.html#AsDateTime)

StringExtensions.AsDateTime 
AsDateTime 
Converts the string to a DateTime. Fails if the value is not a valid date/time string.

### [StringExtensions.AsDateTimeOffset](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-stringextensions.html#AsDateTimeOffset)

StringExtensions.AsDateTimeOffset 
AsDateTimeOffset 
Converts the string to a DateTimeOffset. Fails if the value is not a valid date/time with offset string.

### [StringExtensions.AsDecimal](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-stringextensions.html#AsDecimal)

StringExtensions.AsDecimal 
AsDecimal 
Converts the string to a decimal. Fails if the value is not a valid decimal.

### [StringExtensions.AsFloat](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-stringextensions.html#AsFloat)

StringExtensions.AsFloat 
AsFloat 
Converts the string to a float. Fails if the value is not a valid float.

### [StringExtensions.AsGuid](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-stringextensions.html#AsGuid)

StringExtensions.AsGuid 
AsGuid 
Converts the string to a Guid. Fails if the value is not a valid GUID string.

### [StringExtensions.AsInteger](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-stringextensions.html#AsInteger)

StringExtensions.AsInteger 
AsInteger 
Converts the string to an integer. Fails if the value is not a valid integer.

### [StringExtensions.AsInteger64](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-stringextensions.html#AsInteger64)

StringExtensions.AsInteger64 
AsInteger64 
Converts the string to a 64-bit integer. Fails if the value is not a valid 64-bit integer.

### [StringExtensions.AsTimeSpan](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-stringextensions.html#AsTimeSpan)

StringExtensions.AsTimeSpan 
AsTimeSpan 
Converts the string to a TimeSpan. Fails if the value is not a valid time span string.

### [InferenceMode](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-inferencemode.html)

InferenceMode 
 This is the public inference mode enum used when initializing a type provider,
 with backward compatibility. 
InferenceMode.BackwardCompatible 
BackwardCompatible 
InferenceMode.NoInference 
NoInference 
InferenceMode.ValuesOnly 
ValuesOnly 
InferenceMode.ValuesAndInlineSchemasHints 
ValuesAndInlineSchemasHints 
InferenceMode.ValuesAndInlineSchemasOverrides 
ValuesAndInlineSchemasOverrides

### [InferenceMode.BackwardCompatible](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-inferencemode.html#BackwardCompatible)

InferenceMode.BackwardCompatible 
BackwardCompatible 
 Used as a default value for backward compatibility with the legacy InferTypesFromValues boolean static parameter.
 The actual behaviour will depend on whether InferTypesFromValues is set to true (default) or false.

### [InferenceMode.NoInference](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-inferencemode.html#NoInference)

InferenceMode.NoInference 
NoInference 
 Type everything as strings
 (or the most basic type possible for the value when it's not string, e.g. for json numbers or booleans).

### [InferenceMode.ValuesOnly](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-inferencemode.html#ValuesOnly)

InferenceMode.ValuesOnly 
ValuesOnly 
 Infer types from values only. Inline schemas are disabled.

### [InferenceMode.ValuesAndInlineSchemasHints](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-inferencemode.html#ValuesAndInlineSchemasHints)

InferenceMode.ValuesAndInlineSchemasHints 
ValuesAndInlineSchemasHints 
 Inline schemas types have the same weight as value infered types.

### [InferenceMode.ValuesAndInlineSchemasOverrides](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-inferencemode.html#ValuesAndInlineSchemasOverrides)

InferenceMode.ValuesAndInlineSchemasOverrides 
ValuesAndInlineSchemasOverrides 
 Inline schemas types override value infered types. (Value infered types are ignored if an inline schema is present)

### [TextConversions](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html)

TextConversions 
 Conversions from string to string/int/int64/decimal/float/boolean/datetime/timespan/guid options 
TextConversions.AsBoolean 
AsBoolean 
TextConversions.AsDateTime 
AsDateTime 
TextConversions.AsDateTimeOffset 
AsDateTimeOffset 
TextConversions.AsDecimal 
AsDecimal 
TextConversions.AsFloat 
AsFloat 
TextConversions.AsGuid 
AsGuid 
TextConversions.AsInteger 
AsInteger 
TextConversions.AsInteger64 
AsInteger64 
TextConversions.AsString 
AsString 
TextConversions.AsTimeSpan 
AsTimeSpan 
TextConversions.DefaultCurrencyAdorners 
DefaultCurrencyAdorners 
TextConversions.DefaultMissingValues 
DefaultMissingValues 
TextConversions.DefaultNonCurrencyAdorners 
DefaultNonCurrencyAdorners

### [TextConversions.AsBoolean](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#AsBoolean)

TextConversions.AsBoolean 
AsBoolean 
Attempts to parse the string as a boolean. Accepts "true", "false", "yes", "no", "1", "0" (case-insensitive).

### [TextConversions.AsDateTime](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#AsDateTime)

TextConversions.AsDateTime 
AsDateTime 
Attempts to parse the string as a DateTime using ISO 8601 format or MSFT JSON date format.

### [TextConversions.AsDateTimeOffset](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#AsDateTimeOffset)

TextConversions.AsDateTimeOffset 
AsDateTimeOffset 
Attempts to parse the string as a DateTimeOffset using ISO 8601 format or MSFT JSON date with offset.

### [TextConversions.AsDecimal](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#AsDecimal)

TextConversions.AsDecimal 
AsDecimal 
Attempts to parse the string as a decimal using the given culture.

### [TextConversions.AsFloat](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#AsFloat)

TextConversions.AsFloat 
AsFloat 
Attempts to parse the string as a float using the given culture.

### [TextConversions.AsGuid](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#AsGuid)

TextConversions.AsGuid 
AsGuid 
Attempts to parse the string as a Guid.

### [TextConversions.AsInteger](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#AsInteger)

TextConversions.AsInteger 
AsInteger 
Attempts to parse the string as an integer using the given culture.

### [TextConversions.AsInteger64](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#AsInteger64)

TextConversions.AsInteger64 
AsInteger64 
Attempts to parse the string as a 64-bit integer using the given culture.

### [TextConversions.AsString](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#AsString)

TextConversions.AsString 
AsString 
 Turns empty or null string value into None, otherwise returns Some

### [TextConversions.AsTimeSpan](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#AsTimeSpan)

TextConversions.AsTimeSpan 
AsTimeSpan 
Attempts to parse the string as a TimeSpan using the given culture.

### [TextConversions.DefaultCurrencyAdorners](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#DefaultCurrencyAdorners)

TextConversions.DefaultCurrencyAdorners 
DefaultCurrencyAdorners 
 `¤` `$` `¢` `£` `¥` `₱` `﷼` `₤` `₭` `₦` `₨` `₩` `₮` `€` `฿` `₡` `៛` `؋` `₴` `₪` `₫` `₹` `ƒ`

### [TextConversions.DefaultMissingValues](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#DefaultMissingValues)

TextConversions.DefaultMissingValues 
DefaultMissingValues 
 `NaN` `NA` `N/A` `#N/A` `:` `-` `TBA` `TBD`

### [TextConversions.DefaultNonCurrencyAdorners](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-textconversions.html#DefaultNonCurrencyAdorners)

TextConversions.DefaultNonCurrencyAdorners 
DefaultNonCurrencyAdorners 
 `%` `‰` `‱`

### [JsonConversions](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-jsonconversions.html)

JsonConversions 
 Conversions from JsonValue to string/int/int64/decimal/float/boolean/datetime/datetimeoffset/timespan/guid options 
JsonConversions.AsDateTime 
AsDateTime 
JsonConversions.AsDateTimeOffset 
AsDateTimeOffset 
JsonConversions.AsDecimal 
AsDecimal 
JsonConversions.AsFloat 
AsFloat 
JsonConversions.AsInteger 
AsInteger 
JsonConversions.AsInteger64 
AsInteger64 
JsonConversions.AsString 
AsString 
JsonConversions.AsTimeSpan 
AsTimeSpan 
JsonConversions.AsGuid 
AsGuid

### [JsonRuntime.GetNonOptionalValue](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-jsonruntime.html#GetNonOptionalValue)

JsonRuntime.GetNonOptionalValue 
GetNonOptionalValue 
 Operation that extracts the value from an option and reports a meaningful error message when the value is not there
 If the originalValue is a scalar, for missing strings we return "", and for missing doubles we return NaN
 For other types an error is thrown

### [JsonRuntime.GetNonOptionalValueStrict](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-jsonruntime.html#GetNonOptionalValueStrict)

JsonRuntime.GetNonOptionalValueStrict 
GetNonOptionalValueStrict 
 Operation that extracts the value from an option and always throws if the value is not present.
 Used when ExceptionIfMissing=true to raise an exception for missing fields instead of returning defaults.

### [JsonRuntime.GetPropertyPacked](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-jsonruntime.html#GetPropertyPacked)

GetPropertyPacked

HtmlSchemaGroup.TypeUrl 
TypeUrl 
 The full schema type URL (e.g. "http://schema.org/Person")

HtmlSchemaGroup.Items

### [ResolutionFolderResolver](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-xmlschema-resolutionfolderresolver.html)

ResolutionFolderResolver 
 A custom XmlResolver is needed for included files because we get the contents of the main file
 directly as a string from the FSharp.Data infrastructure. Hence the default XmlResolver is not
 able to find the location of included schema files. 
ResolutionFolderResolver.``.ctor`` 
``.ctor``

### [ResolutionFolderResolver.``.ctor``](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-xmlschema-resolutionfolderresolver.html#``.ctor``)

ResolutionFolderResolver.``.ctor`` 
``.ctor``

### [XmlRuntime.ConvertAsName](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-xmlruntime.html#ConvertAsName)

XmlRuntime.ConvertAsName 
ConvertAsName 
 Returns Some if the specified XmlElement has the specified name
 (otherwise None is returned). This is used when the current element
 can be one of multiple elements.

### [CsvFile<'RowType>.Append](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-csvfile-1.html#Append)

CsvFile<'RowType>.Append 
Append 
 Returns a csv with the same rows as the original plus the provided rows appended

### [CsvFile<'RowType>.Cache](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-csvfile-1.html#Cache)

CsvFile<'RowType>.Cache 
Cache 
 Returns a new csv with the same rows as the original but which guarantees
 that each row will be only be read and parsed from the input at most once.

### [CsvFile<'RowType>.Filter](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-csvfile-1.html#Filter)

CsvFile<'RowType>.Filter 
Filter 
 Returns a new csv containing only the rows for which the given predicate returns "true".

### [CsvFile<'RowType>.Map](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-csvfile-1.html#Map)

CsvFile<'RowType>.Map 
Map 
 Returns a new csv where every row has been transformed by the provided mapping function.

CsvFile<'RowType>.Save

### [CsvFile<'RowType>.Skip](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-csvfile-1.html#Skip)

CsvFile<'RowType>.Skip 
Skip 
 Returns a csv that skips N rows and then yields the remaining rows.

### [CsvFile<'RowType>.SkipWhile](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-csvfile-1.html#SkipWhile)

CsvFile<'RowType>.SkipWhile 
SkipWhile 
 Returns a csv that, when iterated, skips rows while the given predicate returns
 <c>true</c>, and then yields the remaining rows.

### [CsvFile<'RowType>.Take](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-csvfile-1.html#Take)

CsvFile<'RowType>.Take 
Take 
 Returns a new csv with only the first N rows of the underlying csv.

### [CsvFile<'RowType>.TakeWhile](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-csvfile-1.html#TakeWhile)

CsvFile<'RowType>.TakeWhile 
TakeWhile 
 Returns a csv that, when iterated, yields rows while the given predicate
 returns <c>true</c>, and then returns no further rows.

### [CsvFile<'RowType>.Truncate](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-csvfile-1.html#Truncate)

CsvFile<'RowType>.Truncate 
Truncate 
 Returns a csv that when enumerated returns at most N rows.

CsvFile<'RowType>.Quote 
Quote 
 The quotation mark use for surrounding values containing separator chars

### [NameUtils](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-nameutils.html)

NameUtils 
 Tools for generating nice member names that follow F# & .NET naming conventions 
NameUtils.nicePascalName 
nicePascalName 
NameUtils.niceCamelName 
niceCamelName 
NameUtils.uniqueGenerator 
uniqueGenerator 
NameUtils.capitalizeFirstLetter 
capitalizeFirstLetter 
NameUtils.trimHtml 
trimHtml 
NameUtils.pluralize 
pluralize 
NameUtils.singularize 
singularize

### [NameUtils.nicePascalName](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-nameutils.html#nicePascalName)

NameUtils.nicePascalName 
nicePascalName 
 Turns a given non-empty string into a nice 'PascalCase' identifier

### [NameUtils.niceCamelName](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-nameutils.html#niceCamelName)

NameUtils.niceCamelName 
niceCamelName 
 Turns a given non-empty string into a nice 'camelCase' identifier

### [NameUtils.uniqueGenerator](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-nameutils.html#uniqueGenerator)

NameUtils.uniqueGenerator 
uniqueGenerator 
<pre> Given a function to format names (such as 'niceCamelName' or 'nicePascalName')
 returns a name generator that never returns duplicate name (by appending an
 index to already used names)

 This function is curried and should be used with partial function application:

     let makeUnique = uniqueGenerator nicePascalName
     let n1 = makeUnique "sample-name"
     let n2 = makeUnique "sample-name"</pre>

### [NameUtils.capitalizeFirstLetter](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-nameutils.html#capitalizeFirstLetter)

NameUtils.capitalizeFirstLetter 
capitalizeFirstLetter

### [NameUtils.trimHtml](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-nameutils.html#trimHtml)

NameUtils.trimHtml 
trimHtml 
 Trim HTML tags from a given string and replace all of them with spaces
 Multiple tags are replaced with just a single space. (This is a recursive
 implementation that is somewhat faster than regular expression.)

### [NameUtils.pluralize](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-nameutils.html#pluralize)

NameUtils.pluralize 
pluralize 
 Return the plural of an English word

### [NameUtils.singularize](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-nameutils.html#singularize)

NameUtils.singularize 
singularize 
 Return the singular of an English word

### [StructuralInference](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuralinference.html)

 Implements type inference for unstructured documents like XML or JSON

StructuralInference.supportsUnitsOfMeasure 
supportsUnitsOfMeasure 
 Checks whether a type supports unit of measure

### [StructuralInference.typeTag](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuralinference.html#typeTag)

StructuralInference.typeTag 
typeTag 
 Returns a tag of a type - a tag represents a 'kind' of type
 (essentially it describes the different bottom types we have)

### [StructuralInference.defaultUnitsOfMeasureProvider](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuralinference.html#defaultUnitsOfMeasureProvider)

StructuralInference.defaultUnitsOfMeasureProvider 
defaultUnitsOfMeasureProvider

StructuralInference.parseUnitOfMeasure 
parseUnitOfMeasure

### [StructuralInference.nameToType](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuralinference.html#nameToType)

StructuralInference.nameToType 
nameToType 
 The inferred types may be set explicitly via inline schemas.
 This table specifies the mapping from (the names that users can use) to (the types used).

### [StructuralInference.parseTypeAndUnit](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuralinference.html#parseTypeAndUnit)

StructuralInference.parseTypeAndUnit 
parseTypeAndUnit 

 Parses type specification in the schema for a single value.
 This can be of the form: <code>type|measure|type<measure></code>
 type{measure} is also supported to ease definition in xml values.

### [StructuralInference.inferPrimitiveType](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuralinference.html#inferPrimitiveType)

StructuralInference.inferPrimitiveType 
inferPrimitiveType 
 Infers the type of a string value
 Returns one of null|typeof<Bit0>|typeof<Bit1>|typeof<bool>|typeof<int>|typeof<int64>|typeof<decimal>|typeof<float>|typeof<Guid>|typeof<DateTime>|typeof<TimeSpan>|typeof<string>
 with the desiredUnit applied,
 or a value parsed from an inline schema.
 (For inline schemas, the unit parsed from the schema takes precedence over desiredUnit when present)

### [StructuralInference.getInferedTypeFromString](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuralinference.html#getInferedTypeFromString)

StructuralInference.getInferedTypeFromString 
getInferedTypeFromString 
 Infers the type of a simple string value

### [InferenceMode'.FromPublicApi](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuralinference-inferencemode'.html#FromPublicApi)

InferenceMode'.FromPublicApi 
FromPublicApi 
 Converts from the public api enum with backward compat to the internal representation with only valid cases.
 If the user sets InferenceMode manually (to a value other than BackwardCompatible)
 then the legacy InferTypesFromValues is ignored.
 Otherwise (when set to BackwardCompatible), inference mode is set to a compatible value.

### [InferenceMode'.NoInference](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuralinference-inferencemode'.html#NoInference)

NoInference

InferenceMode'.ValuesOnly 
ValuesOnly 
 Backward compatible mode.

### [TextRuntime.GetCulture](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-textruntime.html#GetCulture)

TextRuntime.GetCulture 
GetCulture 
 Returns CultureInfo matching the specified culture string
 (or InvariantCulture if the argument is null or empty)

### [TextRuntime.GetMissingValues](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-textruntime.html#GetMissingValues)

TextRuntime.GetMissingValues 
GetMissingValues

### [TextRuntime.GetNonOptionalValue](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-textruntime.html#GetNonOptionalValue)

TextRuntime.GetNonOptionalValue 
GetNonOptionalValue 
 Operation that extracts the value from an option and reports a meaningful error message when the value is not there
 For missing strings we return "", and for missing doubles we return NaN
 For other types an error is thrown

### [TextRuntime.GetNonOptionalValueStrict](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-textruntime.html#GetNonOptionalValueStrict)

TextRuntime.GetNonOptionalValueStrict 
GetNonOptionalValueStrict 
 Operation that extracts the value from an option and always throws if the value is not present.
 Used when ExceptionIfMissing=true to raise an exception for missing fields instead of returning defaults.

### [TextRuntime.NullableToOption](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-textruntime.html#NullableToOption)

TextRuntime.NullableToOption 
NullableToOption 
 Turn a .NET type Nullable<'T> to an F# option type Option<'T>

### [TextRuntime.OptionToNullable](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-textruntime.html#OptionToNullable)

TextRuntime.OptionToNullable 
OptionToNullable 
 Turn an F# option type Option<'T> containing a primitive
 value type into a .NET type Nullable<'T>

### [Bit](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuraltypes-bit.html)

Bit 
 Dummy type to represent that only one of "0" and "1" were found
 Will be generated as a 'bool', unless it's converted to another numerical type

### [InferedMultiplicity](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuraltypes-inferedmultiplicity.html)

InferedMultiplicity 
 For heterogeneous types (types that have multiple possible forms
 such as differently named XML nodes or records and arrays mixed together)
 this type represents the number of occurrences of individual forms

### [InferedType](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuraltypes-inferedtype.html)

InferedType 
<pre> Represents inferred structural type. A type may be either primitive type
 (one of those listed by `primitiveTypes`) or it can be collection,
 (named) record and heterogeneous type. We also have `Null` type (which is
 a subtype of all non-primitive types) and universal `Top` type.

  * For collection, we infer the types of different things that appear in
    the collection and how many times they do.

  * A heterogeneous type (sum type) is simply a choice containing one
    of multiple different possibilities

 Why is collection not simply a list of Heterogeneous types? If we used that
 we would lose information about multiplicity and so we would not be able
 to generate nicer types!</pre> 
InferedType.DropOptionality 
DropOptionality 
InferedType.EnsuresHandlesMissingValues 
EnsuresHandlesMissingValues 
InferedType.GetDropOptionality 
GetDropOptionality 
InferedType.IsJson 
IsJson 
InferedType.IsCollection 
IsCollection 
InferedType.IsRecord 
IsRecord 
InferedType.IsOptional 
IsOptional 
InferedType.IsPrimitive 
IsPrimitive 
InferedType.IsHeterogeneous 
IsHeterogeneous 
InferedType.IsNull 
IsNull 
InferedType.IsTop 
IsTop 
InferedType.CanHaveEmptyValues 
CanHaveEmptyValues 
InferedType.Primitive 
Primitive 
InferedType.Record 
Record 
InferedType.Json 
Json 
InferedType.Collection 
Collection 
InferedType.Heterogeneous 
Heterogeneous 
InferedType.Null 
Null 
InferedType.Top 
Top

### [InferedType.DropOptionality](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuraltypes-inferedtype.html#DropOptionality)

InferedType.DropOptionality 
DropOptionality

### [InferedType.EnsuresHandlesMissingValues](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuraltypes-inferedtype.html#EnsuresHandlesMissingValues)

InferedType.EnsuresHandlesMissingValues 
EnsuresHandlesMissingValues 
 When allowEmptyValues is true, we allow "" and double.NaN, otherwise
 we make the type optional and use None instead.
 It's currently only true in CsvProvider when PreferOptionals is set to false

### [InferedType.GetDropOptionality](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuraltypes-inferedtype.html#GetDropOptionality)

InferedType.GetDropOptionality

### [TypeWrapper.Option](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuraltypes-typewrapper.html#Option)

TypeWrapper.Option 
Option 
 The type T will be converter to type T option

### [TypeWrapper.Nullable](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-structuraltypes-typewrapper.html#Nullable)

TypeWrapper.Nullable 
Nullable 
 The type T will be converter to type Nullable<T>

Indicator.TryGetValueAt 
TryGetValueAt 
 Get the indicator value for the given year, if present

### [Indicator.Item](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/fsharp-data-runtime-worldbank-indicator.html#Item)

Indicator.Item 
Item 
 Get the indicator value for the given year. If there's no data for that year, NaN is returned

### [XsdParsing](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Data/reference/providerimplementation-xsdparsing.html)

XsdParsing 
 A simplified schema model is built from xsd.
 The actual parsing is done using BCL classes.

ParsingContext
